channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped waste, 4th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped waste around the back of 236 high street. They’ve also tried to stuff waste in to my bin and broken the old.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harmony Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th May
item.description:
The issue of fly tipping is on going, and when initial rubbish is not collected it acts as a draw for further dumping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pendas Mead, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Orange box dumped on Becket street, 4th May
item.description:
There is a orange box containing items dumped on the pavement on Becket street. It has been there two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Becket Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches obscuring view., 4th May
item.description:
The beaches are growing at ground level causing anti social behaviour for young people getting up to nefarious activities. They have been growing for a couple of years and now is quite bushy. It's the only tree at the junction next to a small grassy area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larch Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 4th May
item.description:
There are plastic bottles, paper, food packaging and cans on the road and pavement alongside park and student building on Tabard Street. It has been there two days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All bins overflowing in this part of the estate, 4th May
item.description:
All bibs in these 8 blocks overflowing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car been abandoned on edge of driveway, 4th May
item.description:
Been here for 3 months hasn’t moved and has flat tyre. Parked illegally and absconded on edge or someone’s drive way Number plate LX56 XKJ
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 204, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th May
item.description:
More flytipping on opposite side of Ceres Road and Kashgar
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ceres Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 large parallel pot holes, 4th May
item.description:
These 2 large parallel pot holes have been present for months. They are completely unavoidable for us driving our 2 front wheels take the brunt of hitting the pot hole and damaged work surface. They are getting worse, and no signs of acknowledgement on the ground to show it being fixed. This is something to be addressed asap, your get one incompetent driver hit or try to avoid them at night and crash
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Create motorcycle/scooter parking bay on Rollins Street SE15 1NS, 4th May
item.description:
This corner on Rollins Street SE15 1NS is unused and taken over by garbage. With a number of members in the community owning scooters and motorcycles, this spot could be converted to a motorcycle parking bay with wall or ground anchors for added safety--this would be a simple, low cost effort and will go a long way. Currently there is no space to secure scooters or motorcycles anywhere in the area. Much appreciated Mohit

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th May
item.description:
Mattress and chair on corner of Ceres Road and Kashgar.Been there for a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ceres Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 4th May
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This vehicle has been here for some three months!!!, 4th May
item.description:
Full of spare wheels and tyres, tyres flat, hasn't moved for a very long time. Obviously been dumped!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 4th May
item.description:
As above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man hole cover missing, 4th May
item.description:
There has been a ‘temporary’ manhole cover here (pavement opposite 13 Love Walk SE5 8SQ) for more than two months now but no sign of a permanent one being installed. How long is temporary? Not this long I think. Please can we have a permanent cover installed and the temporary one removed asap?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Love Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped appliance, 4th May
item.description:
Dumped appliance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping of Rubbish, 4th May
item.description:
Rubbish abandoned
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped items with rats crawling around, 4th May
item.description:
Fly tipped items that need cleaning and we should get a sign telling people about the consequences fine wise for fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Random litter, 4th May
item.description:
Usual place back door herrick house…..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Milton Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage piles and litter on Rollins Street, 4th May
item.description:
Hi, For the past 6 months, there's been a garbage pile and poorly maintained streets. Both Rollins street and Sharrat street in South Bermondsey SE15 1NS are always littered with garbage and are the most neglected by the councils cleaning teams. Would appreciate the council not neglecting these streets when it comes to regular cleaning. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rollins Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
